name: swipe-rail
title: Swipe Rail
description: A contact circle leads a horizontal card rail through a fast drag, momentum carry, and settled snap to the next card.
evidence: Video Primitives v1 Wave F U2 swipe-rail contract

variables.label: Card count
variables.description: Number of cards rendered in the rail.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Active color used by the focused card and contact circle.

variables.label: Card label prefix
variables.description: Text placed before each card number.
